2. Find the area of a square with sides 1 1/4 units. Use fractions.

3. A biscuit recipe calls for 1 1/2 cups of buttermilk, and Mary plans to make the recipe one and a half times, three times a week, in order to sell biscuits. How much buttermilk does she need in a week?

problems.label: 7a
problems.group: 7. Isabella was bicycling from her house to her friend's, which was 3/4 kilometre away. Then, 2/3 of the way there, she realised she had forgotten something, so she had to return home. What distance did Isabella bicycle from her home to the turning point and back?
